title: Input Mask
description: A powerful Angular directive that provides input masking functionality for various data types including Hijri dates, digits, decimal numbers, and thousands-separated numbers. Built on top of the Maska.js library for robust input validation and formatting.

sections.title: Usage
sections.description: Basic usage of the input mask directive with default settings.

sections.title: Hijri Date Mode
sections.description: Input masking for Hijri calendar dates with automatic validation and formatting.

sections.title: Digits Mode
sections.description: Numeric input masking with optional range validation.

sections.title: Decimal Mode
sections.description: Decimal number input masking with configurable precision.

sections.title: Thousands Separator Mode
sections.description: Number formatting with automatic thousands separators.

sections.title: Min and Max Value
sections.description: Min and max value for numeric inputs.

props.name: maskMode
props.description: The mode of input masking to apply.

props.name: separator
props.description: The separator character used in the mask (e.g., '/' for dates, ',' for thousands).

props.name: eager
props.description: Whether to apply the mask eagerly (as user types) or on blur.

props.name: minValue
props.description: Minimum allowed value for numeric inputs.

props.name: maxValue
props.description: Maximum allowed value for numeric inputs.

props.name: decimal
props.description: Number of decimal places allowed for decimal inputs.

events.name: onMaskChanged
events.description: Event emitted when the masked value changes.
